title: Better Friends Button
description: This mod makes the friends buttons on the title and pause screen fit in better
body:
This mod makes the friends buttons fit in with the rest of the title and pause screen layout.
- The friends button on the title screen is full-width below the realms button, and the language and accesability buttons have been restored to their previous positions next to the options and quit buttons
- The row of icon buttons in the pause menu (report bugs, give feedback, friends, and player reporting) stretches to fill the whole row
